================================================================================
CSV file with all metrics: per_image_metrics.csv
Per-image results saved to: predictions/<sample_id>/
  - original.png (raw input image)
  - corrected.png (stage1 perspective corrected)
  - predicted_bitmask.png (model binary prediction)
  - overlay.png (predicted areas highlighted in red)
  - area_summary.png (area summary visualization)
  - area_summary.txt (area metrics: pixels, mm2, cm2)
  - comparison.png (prediction vs ground truth side-by-side)
  - ground_truth_mask.png (merged crack+pothole masks)
  - metrics.json (per-image metrics: TP, TN, FP, FN, Accuracy, IoU, F1)
================================================================================
